name: hashpay
description: A Cloudflare Workers crypto payment gateway with D1, Queues, Cron Triggers, Telegram, and a Vue admin console.

ASSETS.description: Worker Assets generated by `npm run build` and served with SPA fallback.

DB.description: D1 database used for configs, merchants, payment channels, orders, notifications, and reviews. Apply migrations with `npm run db:migrate:remote` after creating the database.

QUEUE_NOTIFY.description: Cloudflare Queue used to deliver merchant callback notifications asynchronously.

TGBOT_TOKEN.description: Worker secret containing the Telegram Bot token used for webhook, Mini App, login, and inline payment flows.

APP_SECRET.description: Worker secret used to sign admin sessions and login challenges. Use a long random value.
